changes.summary: Name values prefixed with Integration- are now exported as Terraform references to genesyscloud_integration resources instead of raw prefixed strings.
parent_integration_id is now resolved as a reference to genesyscloud_integration, using integration_id when needed during export.
Export reference resolution now targets messenger.apps.knowledge.knowledge_base_id instead of the prior apps.knowledge.knowlege_base_id path.
Export reference resolution now targets support_center.enabled_categories.category_id instead of the prior enabled_categories.category_id path.
Export now resolves support_center.knowledge_base_id as a reference to genesyscloud_knowledge_knowledgebase.
Export now resolves support_center.label_filter.label_ids as references to genesyscloud_knowledge_label.
